scenes.narration: Today we're breaking down How Panic Spreads — how it actually works, and why it matters.

scenes.subtext: How the architecture of How Panic Spreads impacts your daily life.
scenes.narration: Most people never see how How Panic Spreads shapes their daily decisions. That changes today.

scenes.subtext: Mapping the outer limits of the network.
scenes.narration: First, let's define where this system starts and where it stops.
scenes.visualDirection: Network graph materializes node by node. Camera holds static_focus. Connections draw themselves.

scenes.subtext: The foundational layer holding the structure together.

scenes.subtext: Complex interactions emerging at the deepest layer.

scenes.subtext: What the raw metrics reveal about How Panic Spreads.

scenes.subtext: The hidden costs externalized by the system.
